name: TC4 Research Table deep parity / note workflow cleanup
scope: Research Table, Research Note, Scribing Tools ink path, note copy/complete flow, recipe cleanup, Thaumonomicon gate audit continuation
changes: Added TC4ResearchTableParity as a guarded coordinate/action ledger for original GuiResearchTable and TileResearchTable adapter values.
ResearchTableMenu now uses original TC4 coordinate constants for scribing tools, research note, player inventory and hotbar slots.
ResearchTableContainerScreen and legacy ResearchTableScreen now use the shared original coordinate ledger instead of repeated magic constants.

strict table-slot ownership: ResearchTableInventoryRuntime no longer falls back to hand/inventory scribing tools or held notes while the research table container is open; slot 0 and slot 1 are authoritative like original TC4.
Research note creation is all-or-nothing: paper and scribing ink are checked before consumption, then consumed through the Research Table action path.

Completed-note duplication prechecks paper, ink sac and original aspect cost before consuming anything; duplication still does not consume scribing-tool durability, matching the earlier TC4 source-mapped copy rule.
Research Table note create/open/copy/complete actions now play original TC4 sound keys write/page/learn through the 1.19.2 sound adapter.
Removed old crafting-table research_note JSON recipes so normal notes come from the original Research Table workflow instead of duplicate recipe clutter.
Added Stage603-622 audit to guard against returning to placeholder buttons, carried-item fallback, duplicate research-note recipes, or raw action-code drift.
adapters: Forge 1.19.2 networking/menu/screen adapters remain necessary, but coordinates, slot ownership, action routing and resource costs are guarded as TC4 parity values.
Thaumonomicon page/icon/recipe gate work from previous stages is preserved; this stage does not claim it is complete.
not_100_percent_original_yet: Research Note graph generation still needs deeper comparison with original GuiResearchRecipe randomization and line rendering.
Research Table pixel parity still needs a screenshot-by-screenshot check of every slot, mouse zone and hover response against TC4 1.7.10.
Thaumonomicon pages/icons/recipe gates are improved but still need a full entry-by-entry ConfigResearch and ConfigRecipes sweep.
Scribing Tools refill/anvil/repair behaviour still needs direct source confirmation before changing it.
next_stage: Stage623-642: finish deeper Research Table / Research Note pixel + state parity, direct Scribing Tools source checks, full Thaumonomicon page/icon/recipe gate sweep, hidden/lost trigger paths.
